pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds a Project with the name 'Orbital Platform'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds a Project with the identifier 'orbital-platform'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds a child Project with the name 'Propulsion System'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds a child Project with the identifier 'propulsion-system'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds a Version with the name 'Phase 1 Launch'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly seeds an Issue with the subject 'Main Thruster Design'.

Verified by checking Redmine source code (app/models/version.rb). The allowed sharing values are 'none', 'descendants', 'hierarchy', 'tree', and 'system'. Since the version needs to be shared with a subproject, 'descendants', 'hierarchy', 'tree', and 'system' are the valid choices.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded data. The parent project is named 'Orbital Platform' (identifier 'orbital-platform') and has a subproject named 'Propulsion System' (identifier 'propulsion-system'). A version named 'Phase 1 Launch' is created in the parent project, and an issue named 'Main Thruster Design' is created in the subproject. In order for the issue to be linked to the parent project's version, the version's sharing setting must be updated to one of 'descendants', 'hierarchy', 'tree', or 'system', which are the sharing settings supported by Redmine to make versions visible to subprojects.
